Welcome To Kuiyonggen

Jun 9, 2023

  • Hi, I’m @kuiyonggen.

  • I’m currently learning dev skills of apps.
  • I’m looking to exchange thoughts on life and work.
  • I’m a father of two kids.

Book List

kids

tales

  • Gossie & Gertie - Olivier Dunrea

My kids love it. They learned from it that “they are best friends”. This was start in their English reading. I see it in their eyes. They want more tales like that. If you know something like the book, please let me know. I’ll be very thankful.

  • Little Hoot - Amy Krouse Rosenthal; Jen Corace - 2008
